description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display showing a dramatic cloud-filled sky wallpaper, with minimal bezels and subtle front-facing sensors at the top. The back is a smooth, matte surface in a light blue-gray color, with a single square camera module and a small flash located in the top left corner. The sides are thin and dark, with a slight protrusion for the screen, and a few small buttons are visible along the edge. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, typical of recent smartphone models. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with plastic components likely used for buttons and internal structures.
description: A sleek, modern mobile phone with a large edge-to-edge display and a matte blue-gray back featuring a single camera module. The design is minimalist, with thin sides and subtle buttons.
description_view_0: Front and back of the phone are visible; the front shows a vivid cloud wallpaper, while the back displays a matte blue-gray finish with a square camera module in the top left.
description_view_1: Side profile view showing the phone's thinness and the slight protrusion of the screen from the body; buttons are faintly visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing both the display with the cloud wallpaper and the back with the camera module; minimal differences from view 0.
description_view_3: Another side profile, nearly identical to view 1, emphasizing the slimness and edge details of the phone.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dramatic, high-contrast image of clouds with a bright light source in the center, resembling a wallpaper. No icons, widgets, or interface elements are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A single square camera module with a lens and flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: A few small, elongated buttons are visible along the right edge, likely serving as power and volume controls.
